rows.label: qev011502_MSG0001
rows.name:
What do you think is the most necessary
quality for a BLADE to possess?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011502_MSG0002
rows.name:
I believe it's calm judgment that
allows one to handle any crisis... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011502_MSG0003
rows.name:
But a woman named Miia, who lacks
even a shred of that, submitted
a transfer request to BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011502_MSG0004
rows.name:
Frankly, it's troubling. She seems
motivated, but relying on motivation
alone will only result in a pointless death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011502_MSG0005
rows.name:
What is up with that creepy
smile on Miia's face... I've
got a bad feeling about this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011502_MSG0006
rows.name:
I just hope she doesn't do anything
foolish... Hm...? You don't happen
to know anything, do you?[ST:wait ]
